MINI MINUTES: 1:35pm
Judge Curtis E.A. Karnow, clerk - Leslie Gomez, nothing on record, dept. 608.

Cause called for Small Claims Appeal. Appellant, KRH Thermal Systems, Inc. appears through counsel Kevin Sullivan. Appearing with Appellant is Michael Rudder. Respondent Tery Carnahan appears through counsel Andrew Cantor. Parties previously sworn, request a continuance. Judge Karnow suggests they take a few moments and review the file to see if they can come up with an agreement and not have to come back.

The parties request that the case be continued until December 17, 2009.
2:00pm

No new evidence was marked or retained. Related to case numbers 828781 & 828782.
